## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands run, scenarios covered, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (or the relevant per-app gates: backend `make check`, frontend `yarn lint && yarn build`)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Comments and docstrings are in English and only where they add value
- [ ] User-facing frontend strings go through i18n (`t("key")`)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Does not entangle Enterprise (`LicenseRef-Assemblix-EE`) code into core/OSS paths
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
